title: Onepiece CIT Totem Pack
description: This pack transforms the Totem of Undying into 18 unique Straw Hat crew member designs, so every revive feels like a pirate’s willpower.
body:
## 📜 Straw Hat Crew – CIT Totem Pack [ **Use Optifine** ]

**By DeathBusterX**
**Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.13 – 1.21+**
**Resolution:** Faithful-Style (32x)
**Format:** `.zip` resource pack
**Version:** v1.0

Bring the **Straw Hat Pirates** into your Minecraft adventure with this **OptiFine CIT Totem of Undying texture pack!**
This pack transforms the **Totem of Undying** into **18 unique Straw Hat crew member** designs, so every revive feels like a pirate’s willpower ✨.

![Totems showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47848b9889824401ef2718733ce5f93058584b07.png)

---

### 📚 Current Available

✔️ Currently Available: _**Seperate Pack Available For Download Too**_

- 🧢 Monkey D. Luffy [[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-luffy)]
- ⚔️ Roronoa Zoro [[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-zoro)]
- 🍊 Nami [[Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-nami)]

---


<details>
<summary>🎮 What This Pack Does</summary>
  
Bring the **Straw Hat Pirates** into your **Minecraft** adventure with this **OptiFine CI**T Totem of Undying texture pack!
This pack transforms the **Totem of Undying** into **18 unique Straw Hat crew member** designs, so every revive feels like a pirate’s willpower ✨.

</details>

---


<details>
<summary>✨ Features</summary>

✅ **18 Totem Variants** – Every Straw Hat crew member has their own Totem texture
✅ **OptiFine CIT Support** – Swap between Totems by renaming them in an Anvil
✅ **Pixel-Art Style** – Clean, vibrant textures that stay true to the anime feel
✅ **Survival-Friendly** – Works seamlessly in vanilla gameplay
✅ **Lightweight Pack** – Optimized for performance, no lag

</details>



---


<details>
<summary>📥 Installation Guide</summary>

**Optifine & Cit Version Minecraft :**

1. ** Download & Install OptiFine** for your Minecraft version.

2. Place the **.zip pack** into your ```resourcepacks``` folder.

3. Activate the pack in **Minecraft Settings → Resource Packs**.

4. Get a **Totem of Undying** in-game.

5. **Rename** it in an **Anvil** to one of the Straw Hat crew names (e.g., ```Luffy```, ```Zoro```, ```Nami```, etc.).

6. Boom! Your totem will now match the Straw Hat character you chose ⚔️☠️

</details>

![How to use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31389d4e58a94ddafd3e63c86d4dddd4fab9adb9.png)

---

| Compatible       | Java Edition 1.13+     |

</details>
